heading: Permissive terms and conditions of plans
label: 2618 Permissive terms and conditions of plans
notes: Amendments1990—Subsecs. (g) to (i). added subsecs. (g) and (h) and redesignated former subsec. (g) as (i).Pub. L. 101–624
amendments: Amendments1990—Subsecs. (g) to (i). added subsecs. (g) and (h) and redesignated former subsec. (g) as (i).Pub. L. 101–624

children.heading: Exemptions
children.label: a Exemptions
children.text: Providing authority to exempt from the provisions of the plan potatoes used for nonfood uses, and authority for the board to require satisfactory safeguards against improper use of such exemptions.

children.heading: Handler payment and reporting schedules
children.label: b Handler payment and reporting schedules
children.text: Providing for authority to designate different handler payment and reporting schedules to recognize differences in marketing practices and procedures utilized in different production areas.

children.heading: Advertisement and sales promotion programs or projects
children.label: c Advertisement and sales promotion programs or projects
children.text: Providing for the establishment, issuance, effectuation, and administration of appropriate programs or projects for the advertising and sales promotion of potatoes and potato products and for the disbursement of necessary funds for such purposes: , That any such program or project shall be directed toward increasing the general demand for potatoes and potato products: , That such promotional activities shall comply with the provisions of .Provided, howeverAnd provided furthersection 2617(f) of this title

children.heading: Research and development projects and studies for marketing and utilization of potatoes
children.label: d Research and development projects and studies for marketing and utilization of potatoes
children.text: Providing for establishing and carrying on research and development projects and studies to the end that the marketing and utilization of potatoes may be encouraged, expanded, improved, or made more efficient, and for the disbursement of necessary funds for such purposes.

children.heading: Reserve funds; accumulation; limitation
children.label: e Reserve funds; accumulation; limitation
children.text: Providing for authority to accumulate reserve funds from assessments collected pursuant to this chapter, to permit an effective and continuous coordinated program of research, development, advertising, and promotion in years when the production and assessment income may be reduced: , That the total reserve fund does not exceed the amount budgeted for two years’ operation.Provided

children.heading: Foreign markets; sales development and expansion
children.label: f Foreign markets; sales development and expansion
children.text: Providing for authority to use funds collected herein, with the approval of the Secretary, for the development and expansion of potato and potato product sales in foreign markets.

children.heading: Assessment; refund
children.label: g Assessment; refund
children.text: Providing that any potato producer or importer against whose potatoes any assessment is made and collected under authority of this chapter and who is not in favor of supporting the research and promotion program as provided for under this chapter shall have the right to demand and receive from the board a refund of such assessment. Such demand shall be made personally by such producer or importer in accordance with regulations and on a form and within a time period prescribed by the board and approved by the Secretary, but in no event less than 90 days, and upon submission of proof satisfactory to the board that the producer or importer paid the assessment for which refund is sought, and any such refund shall be made within 60 days after demand therefor.

children.heading: Assessment authority
children.label: h Assessment authority
children.text: Providing for authority to assess imports of tablestock, frozen, or processed potatoes for ultimate consumption by humans and seed potatoes into the United States.

children.heading: Incidental and necessary terms and conditions
children.label: i Incidental and necessary terms and conditions
children.text: Terms and conditions incidental to and not inconsistent with the terms and conditions specified in this chapter and necessary to effectuate the other provisions of such plan.
